positive: A whimsical and abstract jungle scene featuring interconnected flora and fauna silhouettes. Main elements include stylized tropical leaves (banana, palm, monstera), geometric jungle vines, and playful, subtly detailed forest animals like hummingbirds and sloths in a mid-flight or resting pose. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, creating a strong pattern repeat suitable for fabric printing. Use a limited, rich color palette: deep emerald green, teal, burnt orange, and creamy off-white. The style should be modern minimalist illustration with strong black outlines and high contrast, resembling negative space designs. Lighting should be flat and even to maximize print consistency. Perfect for apparel graphic printing, clean vector aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, watermark, text, signature, gradient, noise, bad anatomy, out of frame, logo, cartoon, photographic, complex shadows
